name: Inotiv, Inc.
summary: Inotiv, Inc. is a leading contract research organization (CRO) providing nonclinical and analytical drug discovery and development services primarily to the pharmaceutical and medical device industries. The company also sells research-quality animals (including non-human primates) and diets to pharmaceutical, biotech, academia, and government clients. Inotiv focuses on bringing new drugs and medical devices through discovery and preclinical phases, and in certain cases clinical phases, while improving efficiency and reducing development costs.
